title: Dropdown Columns with "Select All" Feature
excerpt: If the dropdown column had the ability to allow a user to “Select All” in one click versus the user having to manually select all items, this would be beneficial for reportability. If an additional dropdown option is add…

posts.author: zsbarnard (Zach Barnard (Altair Global))
posts.cookedHtml: If the dropdown column had the ability to allow a user to “Select All” in one click versus the user having to manually select all items, this would be beneficial for reportability. If an additional dropdown option is added that is “All Items”, the reporting off that field would become messy.
